title: The song of a bird, who’s come to love his cage
lines: feathered bird sing of withered herds
of a child’s last grasp of air

title: All living poets
lines: watching the waves of the world
slowly crash into its own symphony

title: the dog frowned, the man drowned
lines: The dog drowned, the man frowned
the pram moved slowly on its own.
words that murder people left alone
moan does the man, who isn’t yet home
but in a prison cell, unknown
and the young girl, who didn’t get to decide
and the fireball dance, and the bohemian boy

title: Mother natures method
lines: The sky split into open view
droplet sized dreams crown the outer edges.

title: The 881 day rainfall, Honomu Maki (1913)
lines: The clouds alabaster eyes watch me
The coldness it creases your bones
it takes the young and the old first
but later your wife, later your baby,
soon the sun is a myth
As soon as everything seems in vain

title: Public transit observations
lines: on the train and all that i can see
is heavy rain, social disdain and a world without peace.

title: Corruption in Hong Kong
lines: the forbidden crutch and colourised context
that left a textured man untouched
in a freedom that was polished,

title: What is art?
lines: its when you define a start
to slap a homeless man with pride
or to strip the president with your eyes
or eat pages from Ayn Rand’s
atlas shrugged whilst in a tent on a hill in the dark.
If you shit bricks with it in mind
after a indian-mexican fusion fiesta, this once last time
or if you craddle a calamity
if you murder a gang of nerds
or touch tip with tough telling terrorists
through silver bullets dipped in an ancient wishing well.
If you laugh or cry but do it on purpose
if you crawl or walk without distance in mind
if it comes from your balls or brain

title: view
lines: Sometimes I look into high rise windows
at the people in them, staring back down at the scene
their view is as beautiful as mine

title: the last poet
lines: no one reads it but himself

title: henry hilmen
lines: he was a man without fears
never too soon, and always late
why not get a house, a wife?
and asked why back, why life?

title: one eye man
lines: I try and cannot pass this demon
he stands bare, with one eye
i am but the song of the bird
whose come to love his own cage
the bars of which, felt of iron irony
i am captive to my own captivity
a set mutiny which leaves me
as black as a pit to a pole
i am no longer captain of my soul
until i stare stark to realise
i am the man who lies
trapped in his own brain chemistry
my eyes are windows to my own
and the curse is ive been here before
ive lost and gained a thousand
yet I find myself here again
face to face with the one eye man

title: just write
lines: there isnt a limit on poetry
write about knees, write about trees
write about ass, fast cars and rent

title: box at sea
lines: put in a box at sea
of the waves hitting the box

title: reflections
lines: to not let those droplets of rain

title: shiny, spineless crustaceans
lines: looking for the river Nile’s source
standing on the horizon by a mile
trying not to fall in and float
and crystal water that plays blues at night

title: sincerity
lines: and all else is just circles
id be hated before i condemn
if it gave a burning chance
if just for my page and my pen

title: Chekhov’s Prop
lines: all chaos will turn out incomplete
but they’ll never really compare or compete
and most of Chekhov’s will serve as superfluous
as the gods that either top the skies

title: patience for beauty
lines: from time spent in static appreciation

title: 6th night
lines: On the sixth night of the forgotten moon
the little ant plays violin and the beatle plays spoon
and the wolf barks no, to the wild hog’s beg
and the cold world stands still, as water falls of the edge

title: depraved disposition
lines: What is beauty but the mouth of a cave
What is truth except trees in twilight
And for there to be more is to crave
Is that so sin that to fight
through life with blocks for boots
And the continual pull of your eyes and mouth by gravity towards the earth
Whereas daily depravity goes on without punishment or curse
And of course by depravity I mean woe without the will
Death in the morning without the flag on the hill
The lonely lilly that stays untouched by being alone,
The fountain that flows through each head on lone nights like water
from a gutter to put out the fire of disposition

title: see yourself through my eyes
lines: the final wave of morning bliss,
till the sun gives the shore a kiss
but when you speak of yourself,
there seems to be only lies

title: the prophet jonah
lines: last night in my dream i beheaded the whale which swallowed me,
deep in its stomach i prayed for provision, many years of purposeful revision,
and yet as the moon collapsed and the heavens burst wide,
i decided divinity is with dignity where destiny resides
